title: [CODEREVIEW-PASS1] coap_status.c:256 uint16_t map_count causes implicit cast in cbor_put_map_header call at 271
description: coap_status.c:271 - cbor_put_map_header expects uint8_t but map_count is now uint16_t. Potential truncation if >255. Add explicit cast and bounds check per CCP-17. Tag: codereview
